notes: Implemented as a HardcodedScriptProcessor (C++ class with scripting-style callbacks). The MPE mode is driven by the global MPEData listener, not a user-facing parameter toggle. When MPE is enabled, messages are tested against a BigInteger bitmask built from mpeStart/mpeEnd channel range (master channel 1 is always allowed). When MPE is disabled, messages are tested against the single channelNumber value. All three MIDI event types (note-on, note-off, controller) use identical filtering logic. Non-matching messages are silently ignored via Message.ignoreEvent(true) - they are not destroyed, just flagged to be skipped by downstream processors.

nodes.label: Ignore
nodes.detail: Message flagged via ignoreEvent, not destroyed
